Heavyweight cotton fleece body and ribbed-knit texture on neckband, cuffs, and hem are not clearly conveyed.

synthesis.rationale: Both judges strongly agree the front-chest logo is catastrophically wrong — rendered as full-color artwork (grey petals, green stems, blue/white cloud) instead of the required tonal black-on-black embossed relief, which is an explicit negative-prompt violation. I sided with Judge 1's lower color and construction scores because the colored logo art does compromise overall color fidelity and the hem appears to be a layered white panel rather than a true ribbed waistband; I also penalized for the missing back view that prevents verification of the gold SR monogram. Hallucinated colored logo elements on a luxury garment trigger the veto and cap the overall well below the vision pair's averages.

refine_prompt:
This is a Black Rose Crewneck (br-001) product render that scored 38/100 in QA review and needs correction.

CRITICAL: This render contains hallucinated decorative elements not in the spec. These must be completely removed. Do not introduce any new decorations, motifs, logos, text, or details that are not explicitly listed in the corrections below.

DEFECTS PRESENT IN CURRENT RENDER:
  - Front chest Black Rose logo is rendered in full color (grey petals, green/grey stems, blue/white cloud) instead of the required tonal black-on-black flattened relief — direct negative-prompt violation.
  - Front chest logo technique appears to be embroidery, print, or appliqué rather than the specified physically embossed/debossed tonal relief.
  - Back-neck gold SR monogram is unverifiable — no back or back-three-quarter view provided, so required rear branding cannot be confirmed.
  - White waist hem does not read as a true ribbed-knit waistband; it looks like a layered white underlayer/panel rather than contrast rib trim matching the cuffs and neckband.
  - Heavyweight cotton fleece body and ribbed-knit texture on neckband, cuffs, and hem are not clearly conveyed.

REQUIRED CORRECTIONS:
  - Replace the colored chest artwork with a subtle tonal black-on-black embossed Black Rose relief — full art (three roses, thorny vines, cloud) impressed into the fabric with shapes visible only via raking-light shadow, no pigment or thread color.
  - Strip all non-black colors (grey, green, blue, white) from the front chest entirely; the embossing must flatten all canonical logo colors to the base black fabric.
  - Add a back or back-three-quarter render showing the small gold-tone embroidered SR monogram at the back-neck just below the white collar, with no other back-center decoration.
  - Render the waist hem as a clean white ribbed-knit band integrated with the body (matching the white ribbed neckband and cuffs), not a layered white garment underneath.
  - Use matte heavyweight cotton fleece for the body with clearly visible vertical ribbing on the white neckband, cuffs, and hem.

Apply these corrections precisely. Preserve all unrelated elements unchanged. Do not add any decorations, text, logos, or details beyond what is explicitly required.

Judge 1's report is the more reliable signal.
